wordplay_note: Biblical Rachel the beloved; a lamb among wolves (androids)
card_description: Rachael Rosen (meaning "Hebrew: ewe or lamb") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?*. Nexus-6 android who believes she is human and seduces Deckard to protect other androids. Name note: Biblical Rachel the beloved; a lamb among wolves (androids). The android who most blurs the line between human and machine empathy. First appears in *Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?*.
first_work: Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?
work_list: Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?
